title: OREGON PROMISE GRANT - 211info
text: HIGHER EDUCATION COORDINATING COMMISSION OREGON PROMISE GRANT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps cover tuition costs at any Oregon community college for recent high school graduates and GED test graduates 3225 25th Street SE Salem, OR 97302 Eligibility: -Be a recent Oregon high school graduate or GED test graduate -Be an Oregon resident for at least 12 months prior to college attendance -For dependent students, parents must also live in Oregon -Have no more than 90 college credits completed or attempted -Students may be subject to eligibility requirements based on their Student Aid Index (SAI) Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 687-7400 2 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 687-7400 ext 2 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, call, or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Student Financial Aid Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - CHAFEE EDUCATION AND TRAINING VOUCHER PROGRAM EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - DECEASED OR DISABLED PUBLIC SAFETY OFFICER GRANT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OFFICE OF STUDENT ACCESS AND COMPLETION EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON BARBER AND HAIRDRESSER GRANT PROGRAM EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON OPPORTUNITY GRANT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON TEACHER SCHOLARS PROGRAM GRANT EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON TRIBAL STUDENT GRANT MILITARY SERVICE - OREGON NATIONAL GUARD STATE TUITION ASSISTANCE PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - OREGON STUDENT CHILD CARE GRANT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HIGHER EDUCATION COORDINATING COMMISSION
